title: agalinis decemloba
intro: Agalinis decemloba, also known as Purple False Foxglove, is a perennial herb native to eastern North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting immune function. Agalinis decemloba can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, allowing for various herbal preparations to be made from its leaves and roots.
